---
title: Introduction
engine: knitr
format: live-html
toc: false
webr:
  packages:
    - dplyr
    - tidyverse
    - ggplot2
    - gtsummary
    - mlbench
  repos:
    - https://r-lib.r-universe.dev
---

 <!-- comment this out if you need to run quarto add r-wasm/quarto-live on th eterminal again -->
{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

# First exercise {.sidebar}

Here is the first exercise 

 with a little callout block

```{webr}
for (x in 1:5) {
  print(x ** 2)
}
```

# Second exercise {.sidebar}

## sub section {.sidebar}

Is right here!

Let's load the `BreastCancer` dataset

```{webr}
data(BreastCancer, package = 'mlbench')
glimpse(BreastCancer)
```
